rationale: Active-only biotech panels overstate return and understate drawdown.
Failed PDUFA outcomes often disappear from active ticker datasets.
PDUFA logic must apply only to relevant life-sciences issuers.
Event dates must be knowable before entry.
Entry and exit offsets must be fixed before seeing event outcomes.
The run-up strategy must exit before the FDA decision.
The basket must beat simple biotech buy-and-hold or cash-equivalent baselines.
Investment mode requires drawdown time-underwater payoff and outlier concentration metrics.
